title: dennstaedtia ordinata
intro: Dennstaedtia ordinata, also known as the common fern or autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dennstaedtiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia ordinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and bronchitis.
